source: World Bank DataBank / World Development Indicators
indicator_description: Number of people spending more than 25% of household consumption or income on out-of-pocket health care expenditure
preprocessing: Selected the latest non-null observation returned for each of AUS, GHA, and IND; retained the API values without rounding or imputation.
limitations: The observations are country-level burden proxies, not individual-level equity strata.
Observation years differ by country because the source is survey-based and sparse.
This snapshot is evidence for the experimental contract only and does not support a stable promotion claim.
